use_cases: Displaying a pulsing placeholder while content is loading
Providing visual feedback during async data fetching
Showing skeleton states for cards, images, or text areas
Improving perceived performance during page transitions
Creating loading indicators for dynamic content
ai_summary: A minimalist skeleton loading component that displays a pulsing placeholder with accent-colored background during content loading states. Designed as an atomic building block for creating loading spinners and content placeholders in various UI contexts across SaaS, e-commerce, and other applications.
